footer.tagline: From sunlit brunch to starlit cocktails in our hidden garden.

hero.title: A hidden garden in the heart of Naxos, in the traditional village of Filoti
hero.description: Away from the bustle of Chora, in the heart of Naxos, in the historic village of Filoti, you'll find a hidden garden filled with flavors and aromas. At Fragkosiko, Cycladic hospitality meets contemporary design. From morning to night, we serve premium coffee and an elevated brunch by day, and refreshing signature cocktails, fine wine, and thoughtfully prepared dishes by evening. Our courtyard is the perfect retreat for every moment of your day.

dayNight.title: From Dawn to Dusk
dayNight.subtitle: From the first light of day with coffee and brunch, to signature cocktails in the evening, experience Fragkosiko from dawn to dusk.

brunch.title: Coffee & Brunch
brunch.description: The day begins with the aroma of freshly roasted coffee. We select fine blends and specialty coffees, crafted with care, to accompany your breakfast or brunch.

cocktails.title: Dinner & Cocktail
cocktails.description: As the sun sets behind the mountains of Naxos, the atmosphere transforms. The courtyard lights come on, and our bar comes to life. From classic choices and premium spirits to our signature cocktails. Pair them with our signature dishes.

cta.title: Ready to Visit?
cta.subtitle: Reserve your spot in our garden or simply walk in—we're in Filoti, Naxos.

courtyard.title: The Hidden Courtyard
courtyard.subtitle: We've created an elegant, refreshing space that accompanies you throughout the day — from your morning coffee and brunch to the most relaxed afternoon moments. And as the sun sets, the atmosphere gently transforms. If you're looking for a distinctive evening experience, different from the usual, then Fragkosiko is the place you should visit.

meta.title: About – Fragkosiko
meta.description: Discover the story behind our hidden garden restaurant in Naxos, Greece.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A celebration of Naxos, its flavors, and the art of island hospitality

story.p1: Fragkosiko was born from a love of Naxos—its sun-soaked mornings, its vibrant evenings, and the way life here moves between the energy of the day and the calm of the night. We wanted to create a space that captures this rhythm, a hidden garden where locals and travelers alike can gather, relax, and savor the island's best.
story.p2: Tucked away in Filoti, Naxos, our courtyard is an oasis—whitewashed walls, lush greenery, and the kind of light that shifts beautifully from morning to midnight. By day, it's the perfect spot for a leisurely brunch and a perfectly brewed coffee. By night, the space transforms into an intimate setting for cocktails, conversation, and connection.
story.p3: Every detail, from the seasonal menu to the thoughtfully curated drinks, reflects our commitment to celebrating local producers, traditional flavors, and the warm hospitality that Naxos is known for. We invite you to step into our garden and experience it for yourself.
story.p4: Every dish we serve, every cocktail we mix, and every glass of wine we pour carries within it our love for quality ingredients and genuine hospitality.
story.p5: Welcome to our garden in Filoti. Welcome to the Fragkosiko family.

name.title: The Name "Fragkosiko"
name.p1: Fragkosiko (Φραγκόσυκο) is the Greek word for the prickly pear cactus, a plant deeply rooted in the landscape and culture of the Greek islands. Its bright pink fruit and resilient nature have made it a symbol of the Mediterranean—beautiful, enduring, and bursting with flavor.
name.p2: The prickly pear inspired not only our name but also our visual identity and flavor philosophy. You'll see its colors woven throughout our space—the soft greens of the cactus pads, the vibrant pink of the fruit, and the warm earth tones of the Cycladic landscape.
name.p3: Like the fragkosiko, our restaurant is about thriving in balance—honoring tradition while embracing the new, offering a welcoming presence in a beautiful, sometimes unexpected place.

local.title: Local Ingredients
local.description: We source from Naxos farmers, fishermen, and producers whenever possible, bringing the island's bounty to your plate.

craft.title: Crafted with Care
craft.description: Every dish and drink is made with attention and intention, from our hand-pressed juices to our signature cocktails.

community.title: Community Spirit
community.description: We believe in creating a welcoming space for everyone—locals, travelers, families, and friends.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Practices
sustainable.description: From reducing waste to supporting local ecosystems, we're committed to caring for our island home.

member1.name: Dimitris Molindris
member1.bio: Born and raised in Naxos, Dimitris brings his love for Greek gastronomy and the authentic ingredients of the Aegean to every dish. As executive chef, he places great emphasis on flavor, quality, and hospitality.
member1.bio2: He also serves as head of public relations and evaluation of new members at the Hellenic Academy of Chefs, actively contributing to the evolution of the modern Greek culinary scene.

member2.name: Christos Lagios
member2.bio: From Karpenisi, with a restless spirit, Christos began his journey behind a bar, always seeking new experiences and different forms of hospitality. His early seasons in Monemvasia, Mykonos, Santorini and Cyprus shaped his philosophy around the guest experience, the energy of the space, and the importance of detail.
member2.bio2: He later evolved into an F&B Manager and consultant, collaborating with major groups, 5-star hotels, and demanding hospitality projects including the AEK – OPAP Arena and the YTON Project Show.
member2.bio3: Today, through his first entrepreneurial venture in Naxos, he aims to create a space with creativity, funky aesthetics, and authentic hospitality that brings a vibrant experience around food, drink, and human connection.

member3.name: Christos Oikonomou
member3.bio: From Corinth, with a deep love for authentic hospitality and service. After years in luxury vehicle sales, Christos learned that true success lies in the details and in the complete satisfaction of those who trust you.
member3.bio2: For him, Fragkosiko in Filoti is the realization of a dream—bringing all his premium service experience into a relaxed paradise in the heart of Naxos, where Cycladic tradition meets exceptional care and every guest feels unique.

experience.title: Experience Our Garden
experience.subtitle: Visit us for brunch, coffee, or evening cocktails

meta.title: Menu – Fragkosiko
meta.description: Explore our brunch menu, signature cocktails, and locally-inspired dishes from Naxos.

hero.title: Our Menu
hero.subtitle: From our menu selections, each dish is rooted in tradition, yet presented with a contemporary twist — creations worth discovering. We use pure, fresh ingredients, sourced mainly from Naxos, from seasonal vegetables and meats to the island's exceptional extra virgin olive oil. Everything is prepared daily by our team, with attention to detail and respect for flavor, because we put our signature on every dish and cocktail.
